---
title: "Cecil Frances Alexander"
---

## Cecil Frances Alexander

**Dates:** (1818-1895)

**Maiden name:** (Humphreys)

### Description

hymnwriter

### Biography

An early friend of CMY, she married (15 October 1850) the Rt. Rev. William Alexander (1824-1911), Dean of Emly (1864) Bishop of Derry (1867), later (1896) Archbishop of Armagh.

### Letters

- Letter from March 26th [1874]
- Letter from June 1st 1865
- Letter from May 26th [1854]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
